+---
+name: prepare-source
+description: "Pre-process a reference video before Gemini analysis. Accepts a local file path or any public URL (direct mp4 link, YouTube, Bilibili, Douyin/TikTok, Instagram, Weibo, 小红书, etc.). Downloads the video if needed, then compresses it to ≤10 MB so it fits within Gemini's inline video budget. Output is a local mp4 path. Use this as Step 0 for all three workflows (A/B/C) before passing the video to Gemini analysis."
+---
+
+# prepare-source
+
+用户输入的视频 → 本地 mp4 ≤ 10MB，直接送 Gemini 分析。
+
+**三个 workflow 共享，Step 0 必跑。**
+
+## Pipeline
+
+```
+用户输入
+  ├─ 本地文件 (mp4/mov/mkv/...) ─────────────────┐
+  └─ URL                                          │
+       ├─ yt-dlp (YouTube/Bilibili/Douyin/        │
+       │          Instagram/Weibo/小红书/400+站)   │
+       └─ curl fallback (直链 mp4/mov)            │
+                                                  ▼
+                                        acquired video (任意大小)
+                                                  │
+                                    ┌─────────────┴──────────────┐
+                                    │  ≤ 10MB?                   │
+                                    ├─ Yes → remux to mp4        │
+                                    └─ No  → ffmpeg 码率压缩     │
+                                             (动态计算目标 kbps)  │
+                                                  ▼
+                                        <stem>_prepared.mp4 (≤10MB)
+                                        stdout: 输出文件路径
+```
+
+## Usage
+
+```bash
+bash {baseDir}/scripts/prepare.sh \
+    -i <path-or-url> \
+    [-o <output.mp4>] \
+    [--target-mb 10] \
+    [--max-height 720] \
+    [--cookies /path/to/cookies.txt]
+```
+
+### Arguments
+
+| Option | Default | Description |
+|---|---|---|
+| `-i / --input` | required | 本地路径或任意视频 URL |
+| `-o / --output` | `<stem>_prepared.mp4` | 输出路径 |
+| `--target-mb` | `10` | 目标大小上限（MB） |
+| `--max-height` | `720` | 压缩时最大高度（px） |
+| `--keep-original` | off | 保留下载的原始文件 |
+| `--cookies` | — | cookies.txt 路径（需要登录的平台） |
+
+### Env overrides
+
+| Var | Effect |
+|---|---|
+| `PREPARE_TARGET_MB` | 默认目标大小 |
+| `PREPARE_MAX_HEIGHT` | 默认最大高度 |
+| `YTDLP_COOKIES_FILE` | yt-dlp cookies 路径 |
+
+### Examples
+
+```bash
+# 本地文件（超 10MB 自动压缩）
+bash prepare.sh -i /downloads/source.mp4 -o /tmp/source_prepared.mp4
+
+# 直链 URL（curl 下载）
+bash prepare.sh -i https://example.com/ad.mp4
+
+# B站/抖音/YouTube（yt-dlp）
+bash prepare.sh -i https://www.bilibili.com/video/BVxxxxxxx
+bash prepare.sh -i https://www.douyin.com/video/xxxxxxx
+bash prepare.sh -i https://youtu.be/xxxxxxx
+
+# 需要登录的站点
+bash prepare.sh -i https://www.xiaohongshu.com/... --cookies ~/cookies.txt
+
+# 自定义目标大小（例如 5MB）
+bash prepare.sh -i source.mp4 --target-mb 5
+```
+
+## Output
+
+- **stdout**: 输出文件的绝对路径（供脚本捕获）
+- **stderr**: 进度日志（`[prepare-source] ...`）
+
+```bash
+# 在 run_pipeline.py 中使用示例
+PREPARED=$(bash {baseDir}/scripts/prepare.sh -i "$USER_INPUT" -o "$RUN_DIR/source.mp4")
+# $PREPARED 即可直接传给 Gemini 分析脚本
+```
+
+## Exit codes
+
+| Code | Meaning |
+|---|---|
+| `0` | 成功，stdout 有输出路径 |
+| `1` | 下载失败（URL 不可达、格式不支持） |
+| `2` | ffmpeg 压缩失败 |
+| `3` | 参数错误 |
+
+## Compression logic
+
+目标码率动态计算：
+
+```
+budget_bits = target_bytes × 0.95 × 8
+total_kbps  = budget_bits / duration_s / 1000
+video_kbps  = total_kbps - 64   (64kbps reserved for AAC audio)
+video_kbps  ≥ 100kbps (floor)
+```
+
+使用 `libx264 + AAC + -movflags faststart`，适合直接送 Gemini inline。
+
+## Supported URL sources
+
+| 平台 | 方式 |
+|---|---|
+| YouTube / YouTube Shorts | yt-dlp |
+| Bilibili | yt-dlp |
+| 抖音 / Douyin | yt-dlp |
+| TikTok | yt-dlp |
+| Instagram Reels | yt-dlp |
+| 微博 / Weibo | yt-dlp |
+| 小红书（部分） | yt-dlp + cookies |
+| 直链 mp4/mov/mkv | curl |
+| 其他 400+ yt-dlp 支持站点 | yt-dlp |
+
+## Prerequisites
+
+```bash
+# 必须
+command -v ffmpeg ffprobe
+
+# yt-dlp（推荐，支持社交平台 URL；缺失则自动降级为 curl）
+pip install yt-dlp   # 或: brew install yt-dlp
+```
+
+## Integration pattern (三个 workflow 共用)
+
+在每个 workflow 的 `run_pipeline.py` Step 0 调用：
+
+```python
+import subprocess
+from pathlib import Path
+
+_PREPARE = str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent / "prepare-source" / "scripts" / "prepare.sh")
+
+def prepare_source(user_input: str, out_dir: Path) -> Path:
+    """Fetch + compress reference video. Returns local path ≤ 10MB."""
+    out_path = out_dir / "source.mp4"
+    result = subprocess.run(
+        ["bash", _PREPARE, "-i", user_input, "-o", str(out_path)],
+        capture_output=True, text=True, check=False
+    )
+    if result.returncode != 0:
+        raise RuntimeError(
+            f"prepare-source failed (exit {result.returncode}):\n{result.stderr}"
+        )
+    return Path(result.stdout.strip())
+```

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# prepare-source: fetch + compress a reference video for Gemini analysis.
+#
+# Input:  --input  <local-path | http/https URL | bilibili/douyin/etc. URL>
+# Output: a local mp4 ≤ TARGET_MB (default 10 MB), ready for Gemini.
+#
+# Strategy:
+#   1. If input is a URL → try yt-dlp first (supports 400+ sites),
+#      fallback to curl (direct mp4/mov links).
+#   2. If the resulting file > TARGET_MB → re-encode with ffmpeg,
+#      targeting a bitrate that fits the size budget.
+#   3. Print the output path to stdout (stderr = progress logs).
+#
+# Exit codes:
+#   0  success — output path on stdout
+#   1  fetch failed (no yt-dlp, curl failed, unsupported URL)
+#   2  compress failed (ffmpeg error)
+#   3  bad arguments
+#
+# Env vars (all optional):
+#   PREPARE_TARGET_MB   Override size target (default 10)
+#   PREPARE_MAX_HEIGHT  Max video height after compression (default 720)
+#   YTDLP_COOKIES_FILE  Path to cookies.txt for authenticated sites
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+# ── defaults ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+TARGET_MB="${PREPARE_TARGET_MB:-10}"
+MAX_HEIGHT="${PREPARE_MAX_HEIGHT:-720}"
+COOKIES_FILE="${YTDLP_COOKIES_FILE:-}"
+
+INPUT=""
+OUTPUT=""
+KEEP_ORIGINAL=0
+
+# ── argument parsing ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+usage() {
+  cat >&2 <<EOF
+Usage: prepare.sh -i <path-or-url> [-o <output.mp4>] [--keep-original] [--target-mb N]
+
+Options:
+  -i / --input        Local file path or video URL (required)
+  -o / --output       Output path (default: <input-stem>_prepared.mp4 in same dir or /tmp)
+  --target-mb N       Target max file size in MB (default: $TARGET_MB)
+  --max-height N      Max height in pixels after resize (default: $MAX_HEIGHT)
+  --keep-original     Keep downloaded original alongside compressed output
+  --cookies FILE      cookies.txt for yt-dlp (authenticated sites)
+EOF
+  exit 3
+}
+
+while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
+  case "$1" in
+    -i|--input)      INPUT="$2";        shift 2 ;;
+    -o|--output)     OUTPUT="$2";       shift 2 ;;
+    --target-mb)     TARGET_MB="$2";    shift 2 ;;
+    --max-height)    MAX_HEIGHT="$2";   shift 2 ;;
+    --keep-original) KEEP_ORIGINAL=1;   shift   ;;
+    --cookies)       COOKIES_FILE="$2"; shift 2 ;;
+    -h|--help)       usage ;;
+    *) [[ -z "$INPUT" ]] && INPUT="$1" || { echo "Unexpected arg: $1" >&2; usage; }; shift ;;
+  esac
+done
+
+[[ -z "$INPUT" ]] && { echo "Error: --input is required" >&2; usage; }
+
+TARGET_BYTES=$(( TARGET_MB * 1024 * 1024 ))
+
+# ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+log() { echo "[prepare-source] $*" >&2; }
+die() { echo "[prepare-source] ERROR: $*" >&2; exit "${2:-1}"; }
+
+is_url() { [[ "$1" =~ ^https?:// ]]; }
+
+file_size() { stat -c%s "$1" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$1" 2>/dev/null || echo 0; }
+
+duration_s() {
+  ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 \
+    -show_entries stream=duration \
+    -of csv=p=0 "$1" 2>/dev/null | head -1
+}
+
+# ── Step 1: acquire ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+WORK_DIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/prepare_source.XXXXXX)
+trap '[[ "$KEEP_ORIGINAL" -eq 0 ]] && rm -rf "$WORK_DIR" || true' EXIT
+
+ACQUIRED=""   # path to downloaded/copied file (may be large)
+
+if is_url "$INPUT"; then
+  log "Input is URL: $INPUT"
+
+  # --- Try yt-dlp (handles YouTube, Bilibili, Douyin, Weibo, Instagram, etc.) ---
+  if command -v yt-dlp &>/dev/null; then
+    log "Trying yt-dlp..."
+    YTDLP_ARGS=(
+      --no-playlist
+      --merge-output-format mp4
+      # Prefer a small format: height ≤ 720, mp4, h264
+      -f "bestvideo[height<=720][ext=mp4][vcodec^=avc]+bestaudio[ext=m4a]/bestvideo[height<=720]+bestaudio/best[height<=720]/best"
+      -o "$WORK_DIR/ytdlp_dl.%(ext)s"
+    )
+    [[ -n "$COOKIES_FILE" && -f "$COOKIES_FILE" ]] && YTDLP_ARGS+=(--cookies "$COOKIES_FILE")
+
+    if yt-dlp "${YTDLP_ARGS[@]}" "$INPUT" >&2; then
+      ACQUIRED=$(find "$WORK_DIR" -name "ytdlp_dl.*" | head -1)
+      log "yt-dlp success: $(basename "$ACQUIRED")"
+    else
+      log "yt-dlp failed, falling back to curl..."
+    fi
+  else
+    log "yt-dlp not found, trying curl..."
+  fi
+
+  # --- Fallback: direct curl (works for plain mp4/mov links) ---
+  if [[ -z "$ACQUIRED" ]]; then
+    EXT="mp4"
+    # Guess extension from URL
+    URL_PATH="${INPUT%%\?*}"
+    case "${URL_PATH##*.}" in mp4|mov|mkv|webm|avi|m4v) EXT="${URL_PATH##*.}" ;; esac
+
+    CURL_OUT="$WORK_DIR/curl_dl.$EXT"
+    log "curl download → $CURL_OUT"
+    if curl -sL --max-time 300 --retry 3 \
+        -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; prepare-source/1.0)" \
+        "$INPUT" -o "$CURL_OUT" && [[ -s "$CURL_OUT" ]]; then
+      # Basic sanity: verify ffprobe can read it
+      if ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration "$CURL_OUT" &>/dev/null; then
+        ACQUIRED="$CURL_OUT"
+        log "curl success: $(file_size "$CURL_OUT") bytes"
+      else
+        die "curl downloaded file is not a valid video: $CURL_OUT" 1
+      fi
+    else
+      die "curl download failed for URL: $INPUT" 1
+    fi
+  fi
+
+else
+  # Local file
+  [[ -f "$INPUT" ]] || die "File not found: $INPUT" 3
+  ACQUIRED="$INPUT"
+  log "Local file: $INPUT ($(file_size "$INPUT") bytes)"
+fi
+
+# ── Step 2: determine output path ─────────────────────────────────────────────
+if [[ -z "$OUTPUT" ]]; then
+  if is_url "$INPUT"; then
+    STEM=$(basename "${INPUT%%\?*}")
+    STEM="${STEM%.*}"
+    [[ -z "$STEM" || "$STEM" == "/" ]] && STEM="source"
+    OUTPUT="/tmp/${STEM}_prepared.mp4"
+  else
+    DIR=$(dirname "$INPUT")
+    STEM=$(basename "${INPUT%.*}")
+    OUTPUT="${DIR}/${STEM}_prepared.mp4"
+  fi
+fi
+
+mkdir -p "$(dirname "$OUTPUT")"
+
+# ── Step 3: compress if needed ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+ACQUIRED_SIZE=$(file_size "$ACQUIRED")
+log "Acquired size: $(( ACQUIRED_SIZE / 1024 / 1024 ))MB (target ≤ ${TARGET_MB}MB)"
+
+if [[ "$ACQUIRED_SIZE" -le "$TARGET_BYTES" ]]; then
+  log "File is already within target size, copying as-is."
+  # Still re-mux to mp4 to ensure compatibility
+  if [[ "$ACQUIRED" != "$OUTPUT" ]]; then
+    ffmpeg -y -hide_banner -loglevel error \
+      -i "$ACQUIRED" -c copy "$OUTPUT" 2>/dev/null \
+      || cp "$ACQUIRED" "$OUTPUT"
+  fi
+else
+  # Calculate target bitrate: budget 95% of target bytes for video+audio
+  DUR=$(duration_s "$ACQUIRED")
+  if [[ -z "$DUR" || "$DUR" == "N/A" ]]; then
+    # fallback: ffprobe container duration
+    DUR=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of csv=p=0 "$ACQUIRED" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
+  fi
+  DUR=${DUR:-30}
+  DUR_INT=${DUR%.*}
+  DUR_INT=${DUR_INT:-30}
+
+  BUDGET_BITS=$(( TARGET_BYTES * 95 / 100 * 8 ))
+  TOTAL_KBPS=$(( BUDGET_BITS / DUR_INT / 1000 ))
+
+  # Reserve 64 kbps for audio, rest for video
+  AUDIO_KBPS=64
+  VIDEO_KBPS=$(( TOTAL_KBPS - AUDIO_KBPS ))
+  [[ "$VIDEO_KBPS" -lt 100 ]] && VIDEO_KBPS=100
+
+  log "Compressing: dur=${DUR_INT}s → video=${VIDEO_KBPS}kbps audio=${AUDIO_KBPS}kbps"
+  log "Output: $OUTPUT"
+
+  # Two-pass if possible, single-pass fallback
+  ffmpeg -y -hide_banner -loglevel error \
+    -i "$ACQUIRED" \
+    -vf "scale='min(iw,${MAX_HEIGHT}*dar)':'min(ih,${MAX_HEIGHT})',scale=trunc(iw/2)*2:trunc(ih/2)*2" \
+    -c:v libx264 -b:v "${VIDEO_KBPS}k" -maxrate "${VIDEO_KBPS}k" -bufsize "$(( VIDEO_KBPS * 2 ))k" \
+    -preset fast -profile:v baseline \
+    -c:a aac -b:a "${AUDIO_KBPS}k" -ar 44100 -ac 2 \
+    -movflags +faststart \
+    "$OUTPUT" 2>&2 || die "ffmpeg compression failed" 2
+
+  OUT_SIZE=$(file_size "$OUTPUT")
+  log "Done: $(( OUT_SIZE / 1024 / 1024 ))MB (target was ≤${TARGET_MB}MB)"
+  if [[ "$OUT_SIZE" -gt "$TARGET_BYTES" ]]; then
+    log "Warning: output still exceeds target by $(( (OUT_SIZE - TARGET_BYTES) / 1024 ))KB — try a shorter clip or lower --target-mb"
+  fi
+fi
+
+# ── Done ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+echo "$OUTPUT"

+# seedance-runner Skill
+
+Shared execution layer for Seedance 2.0 Pro chunk generation.
+Accepts a `generation_plan.json` from any strategy-layer workflow (A/B/C)
+and handles concurrent submit, polling, download, and resume.
+
+
+## Audio Strategy (MANDATORY)
+
+### What Seedance generates
+- `generate_audio: true` → Seedance generates human voiceover (VO) + ambient SFX only
+- **NO background music (BGM)** — the `run_chunks.py` script auto-prepends a no-BGM instruction to every prompt
+- BGM is ALWAYS sourced from the original reference video via Demucs separation and mixed in post by `video-editor`
+
+### How to write the audio section of a chunk prompt
+Every chunk prompt passed to `run_chunks.py` (via `generation_plan.json["chunks"][N]["prompt"]`)
+MUST include a `【口播台词 VO】` section with:
+
+1. **声音风格行**：声线 + 语速(字/分钟) + 情绪 + 参考风格
+2. **逐时间戳台词**：`[起-止秒] 「台词」（语气说明）`
+3. **BGM声明**：`【背景音乐】无BGM。只要人声VO和自然环境音效。`
+
+Example:
+```
+【口播台词 VO】
+【背景音乐】无BGM。只要人声VO和自然环境音效，不要生成任何节奏感音乐。
+声音风格：年轻女性声线，语速极快（约每分钟250字），声线清亮甜美，情绪饱满，抖音AI配音风格。
+
+[0-2秒] 「升维提升——只需一次」（语气上扬，"一次"加重，制造悬念）
+[2-4秒] 「三年以上——无需再补充！」（坚定果断，"三年"加重）
+```
+
+
+## Script
+
+### run_chunks.py
+
+```bash
+python3 run_chunks.py \
+    --plan    runs/run-01/generation_plan.json \
+    --out-dir runs/run-01/
+```
+
+Optional flags:
+- `--max-workers N`    Override concurrent workers (default: from plan or 5)
+- `--poll-interval N`  Seconds between status checks (default: 20)
+- `--timeout N`        Per-chunk timeout in seconds (default: 1800)
+
+**Output:**
+- `chunks/chunk_NN.mp4` — Downloaded chunk videos
+- `chunks/chunk_NN_payload.json` — Submitted payloads (for debugging)
+- `seedance_results.json` — State file (task_ids, mp4_paths, done flag)
+
+Prints ordered mp4 paths as JSON to stdout on completion:
+```json
+{"mp4_paths": ["/path/chunk_00.mp4", "/path/chunk_01.mp4"]}
+```
+
+## generation_plan.json Schema
+
+See `references/generation-plan-schema.md` for full field reference.
+
+## References
+
+| File | Purpose |
+|---|---|
+| `references/generation-plan-schema.md` | `generation_plan.json` 完整字段说明 |
+| `references/seedance-prompt-template.md` | Seedance 每块 chunk 的 prompt 结构模板（[VISUAL]/[VOICEOVER]/[AUDIO]）和关键错误用语说明 |
+
+Minimal example:
+```json
+{
+  "version": "1",
+  "source_video": "/abs/path/to/source.mp4",
+  "chunks": [
+    {
+      "index": 0,
+      "prompt": "Cinematic close-up of product...",
+      "duration": 10,
+      "reference_asset": "asset://abc123"
+    }
+  ],
+  "captions": [],
+  "seedance": {"model": "dreamina-seedance-2-0-260128", "max_workers": 5}
+}
+```
+
+## Key behaviours
+
+### Resumable execution
+`seedance_results.json` persists state after each submit and poll.
+Re-running with the same `--out-dir` skips already-completed chunks.
+
+### reference_asset
+Must be an `asset://ID` from the chameleon skill asset registration.
+Raw image URLs are rejected by Seedance's face-privacy filter.
+If no reference image is needed, omit the `reference_asset` field entirely.
+
+### Duration cap
+`duration` values > 15s are silently clamped to 15s.
+
+### Concurrent strategy
+- Submit phase: all pending chunks submitted concurrently (ThreadPoolExecutor)
+- Poll phase: all pending tasks polled concurrently
+- State saved after each individual result so partial progress is preserved
+
+## Environment variables required
+
+| Variable | Purpose |
+|---|---|
+| `USER_INTERNAL_TOKEN` | Bearer auth for Seedance API |
+| `ECAP_PROXY_BASE_URL` | Proxy base URL |
+| `LITELLM_API_BASE` | LiteLLM base URL |
+| `LITELLM_API_KEY` | LiteLLM API key |
+
+## Integration pattern
+
+Workflow `run_pipeline.py` calls seedance-runner as a CLI subprocess:
+
+```python
+_SKILL_DIR  = Path(__file__).parent.parent.parent  # .agents/skills/
+_SR_RUN     = str(_SKILL_DIR / "seedance-runner" / "scripts" / "run_chunks.py")
+
+# Write generation_plan.json first, then:
+result_raw = _run_capture([
+    "python3", _SR_RUN,
+    "--plan",    str(plan_json),
+    "--out-dir", str(out_dir),
+])
+result = json.loads(result_raw)
+mp4_paths = result["mp4_paths"]  # ordered list of downloaded chunk paths
+```
+
+---
+
+## Script: erase_subtitles.py — Subtitle Garble Fix
+
+Seedance occasionally burns garbled or unwanted Chinese/English subtitles into generated chunks.
+This script calls the ecap-proxy MediaKit endpoint (`ark-erase-video-subtitle-pro`) to erase them.
+It lives here because the input is a Seedance ARK URL and the fix belongs to the same execution layer.
+
+### Routing rule (HARD)
+
+> ⚠️ **一旦检测到以下任意意图，必须调用本脚本。禁止用 ffmpeg 模糊/覆盖/截剪等手段自行处理。**
+
+```
+触发关键词（以下任意表达均触发）：
+
+  中文：
+    字幕乱码 / 有乱字幕 / 字幕打居 / 画面里有字 / 视频里有字幕
+    把字幕擦掉 / 去掉字幕 / 去掉画面上的字 / 删除字幕 / 清除字幕
+    底层有字 / 屏幕上有字幕 / chunk 有字幕 / 视频上有文字
+    不要字幕 / 第一步擦字幕 / 擦除内容字幕
+
+  英文：
+    erase subtitles / remove subtitles / clean subtitles / strip subtitles
+    subtitle garble / garbled text / burned-in text / unwanted text on video
+    video has subtitles / text on screen / text overlay
+
+路由规则：
+  匹配以上任意表达
+    → 首先告知用户下方的三条限制
+    → 确认后调用 seedance-runner/scripts/erase_subtitles.py
+    → 禁止用任何其他方式处理（ffmpeg filter/截剪/人工覆盖等）
+
+  其他情况
+    → 正常生成流程已经通过 prompt 前缀抑制字幕，无需主动提及此流程
+```
+
+### Usage
+
+```bash
+# Most common: ARK URL直接传入 (from seedance_results.json for the affected chunk)
+python3 scripts/erase_subtitles.py --video-url "<chunk ARK URL>"
+
+# Query an already-submitted task:
+python3 scripts/erase_subtitles.py --query <erase_task_id>
+
+# Submit only (don't poll, return task_id immediately):
+python3 scripts/erase_subtitles.py --video-url "<ARK URL>" --submit-only
+```
+
+### 执行前必须确认的信息
+
+用户说出字幕擦除意图后，在调用脚本前必须先进行以下信息确认：
+
+1. **哪个 chunk 有字幕？** — 让用户指出具体是 chunk 00 / 01 / 02…
+2. **ARK URL 是否还在有效期内？** — ARK URL 有 24h TTL，过期无法擦除。
+   如果最近已从 `seedance_results.json` 中获取过 `video_url`，则直接使用。
+   如果不确定，读取 `seedance_results.json` 中对应 chunk 的 `video_url` 字段。
+3. **告知用户以下限制**，确认后再执行。
+
+### Hard constraints
+
+1. Input **must** be the original Seedance ARK URL
+   (`ark-acg-*.tos-*.volces.com` or `ark-acg-*.bytepluses.com`).
+   Re-hosted URLs (R2, S3, CDN) are **rejected** by the upstream API.
+2. ARK URL has a **24-hour TTL** — submit erasure before it expires.
+3. Expected time: **3–5 min** typical; up to 20–30 min under load.
+4. Subtitles must be in the **lower 50% of frame**, **Chinese or English only**.
+5. **Seedance-generated videos only** — user uploads or other model outputs are not supported.
+6. 擦除后输出的 chunk 码率可能是其他 chunk 的3−4倍。`concat.py` 会自动检测并归一化，**无需手动处理**。
+
+### Output
+
+On success, prints JSON containing `result.video_url` — the cleaned video URL (24h TTL).
+Download it immediately and replace the affected `chunk_NN.mp4` before running `video-editor` concat.
+
+### Environment variables (same as run_chunks.py — no new deps)
+
+| Variable | Purpose |
+|---|---|
+| `ECAP_PROXY_BASE_URL` | Proxy base URL |
+| `LITELLM_API_BASE` | LiteLLM base URL |
+| `LITELLM_API_KEY` | LiteLLM API key |
+| `ECAP_PROXY_API_KEY` | Optional proxy key (forwarded as `X-Proxy-Key`) |

+# generation_plan.json — Interface Schema
+
+This file defines the contract between the strategy layer (Workflow A/B/C) and the
+execution layer (seedance-runner). Every workflow must write a `generation_plan.json`
+before invoking `seedance-runner/scripts/run_chunks.py`.
+
+## Schema
+
+```json
+{
+  "version": "1",
+  "source_video": "/abs/path/to/source.mp4",
+  "chunks": [
+    {
+      "index": 0,
+      "prompt": "Cinematic close-up...",
+      "duration": 10,
+      "reference_asset": "asset://abc123",
+      "ratio": "9:16",
+      "resolution": "1080p"
+    }
+  ],
+  "captions": [
+    {"start": 1.2, "end": 3.8, "text": "台词文字"}
+  ],
+  "seedance": {
+    "model": "dreamina-seedance-2-0-260128",
+    "max_workers": 5
+  }
+}
+```
+
+## Field Reference
+
+| Field | Required | Description |
+|---|---|---|
+| `version` | yes | Schema version, currently `"1"` |
+| `source_video` | yes | Absolute path to source/reference mp4 (for audio extraction) |
+| `chunks[]` | yes | Ordered list of video chunks to generate |
+| `chunks[].index` | yes | 0-based chunk index |
+| `chunks[].prompt` | yes | Full Seedance generation prompt |
+| `chunks[].duration` | yes | Target duration in seconds (max 15) |
+| `chunks[].reference_asset` | no | `asset://ID` for face/style reference image |
+| `chunks[].ratio` | no | Aspect ratio, default `"9:16"` |
+| `chunks[].resolution` | no | Resolution hint, default `"1080p"` |
+| `captions[]` | no | Subtitle entries; omit or empty array to skip subtitle burn |
+| `captions[].start` | yes | Start time in seconds (float) |
+| `captions[].end` | yes | End time in seconds (float) |
+| `captions[].text` | yes | Subtitle text (verbatim) |
+| `seedance.model` | no | Seedance model id, default `dreamina-seedance-2-0-260128` |
+| `seedance.max_workers` | no | Concurrent worker count, default `5` |
+
+## Notes
+
+- `duration` values above 15s are clamped to 15s by seedance-runner
+- `reference_asset` must be a registered `asset://` id — raw image URLs are rejected by Seedance's face-privacy filter
+- `captions` array is written by the strategy layer (Workflow A/B/C); seedance-runner passes it through to video-editor unchanged
+- video-editor consumes `captions` for ASS subtitle burn; if empty, subtitle step is skipped silently

+# Seedance Per-Chunk Prompt Template
+
+## §5.2 — Seedance per-chunk prompt (Stage 8)
+
+Built per chunk from Gemini's scene_analysis.json. Renders 3 blocks:
+
+```
+[VISUAL] This {chunk_duration}-second chunk plays a sequence of {n_shots}
+cinematic shots shown in the provided reference panel image (labeled
+#{a} through #{z} in a {r}x{c} grid{if has_blank}; bottom-right cell is
+blank{/if}). Treat each panel as an INDEPENDENT visual anchor in
+#{a}->#{z} order:
+
+- #{a} ({duration_a}s): {scene_a.visual_compact}
+- #{b} ({duration_b}s): {scene_b.visual_compact}
+- ... (one line per scene)
+
+NEVER replicate the {r}x{c} grid layout in the output video. Render each shot
+as a normal full-frame cinematic segment in #{a}->#{z} order. Output aspect
+ratio {output_ratio}.
+
+Throughout the chunk: {if same_subject}the SAME {subject_descriptor} appears
+in every shot, matching the face shown in every reference panel.{/if} Soft
+studio lighting consistent across shots, photoreal magazine-grade aesthetic.
+No on-screen text, no subtitles, no watermarks anywhere.
+
+[VOICEOVER] ({voice_tone.gender} {voice_tone.age_range}, {voice_tone.tone},
+{voice_tone.pace} pace, {voice_tone.characteristic} — speaking Mandarin Chinese)
+{chunk_voiceover_text_verbatim}
+
+[AUDIO] No subtitles, no on-screen text overlays anywhere. No background music
+(will be mixed in post-production). Sound effects only — ambient room tone,
+subtle hand and clothing sounds where natural. Voiceover dialogue drives the
+audio track.
+```
+
+**Critical phrasing**:
+- `"Treat each panel as an INDEPENDENT visual anchor in #{a}->#{z} order"` — instructs Seedance to consume the panel as a storyboard, not a layout.
+- `"NEVER replicate the grid layout in the output video"` — primary defense against Seedance copying the 2×3 panel into the video frame.
+- `"in #{a}->#{z} order"` (repeated twice in prompt) — locks playback sequence.
+- VO tone parenthetical right before the spoken text — Seedance 2.0 native VO uses these phrases to set vocal characteristics.
+- VOICEOVER lines verbatim, with Chinese punctuation preserved — no paraphrase.
+
+**Scene visual_compact**: 1-2 sentences max per scene. The full scene
+visual from Gemini (100-150 words) is too long; truncate to ~25 words:
+camera + framing + subject action + key lighting.
+
+**Length budget**: Seedance accepts up to ~4000 chars but quality degrades
+past ~2000. Aim for 1500-2000.
+
+---
+
+## Anti-patterns
+
+- Don't pass per-element rules inline ("the model should...the product should..."). Concentrate them under the IMAGE 2/3/4 reference declarations.
+- Don't say "high quality" — it's filler. Say `photoreal, magazine-grade, ARRI Alexa, 35mm anamorphic, shallow DOF, film grain` for cinematic look or `professional camera, sharp edge-to-edge, editorial photography quality, NOT cinematic` for documentary look.
+- Don't try to control camera motion in [VISUAL] with the word `fast` — Seedance docs flag it as causing jitter. Use `quick`, `swift`, `brisk`.
+- Don't burn brand names into the prompt repeatedly — once in the VO is plenty; multiple mentions cause Seedance to over-render text on screen, which our pipeline forbids.

+#!/usr/bin/env python3
+"""Erase burned-in subtitles from a Seedance 2.0 video via ecap-proxy.
+
+Adaptation of the standalone subtitle-erasure skill for chameleon's
+ecap-proxy + LiteLLM dual-auth flow. The upstream is the ModelArk AI
+MediaKit endpoint (ark-erase-video-subtitle-pro).
+
+Hard constraint: source MUST be an original Seedance ARK ``video_url``
+(the one returned by ``chameleon_generate.py`` as ``video_url`` in the
+success JSON). Re-hosted URLs (R2, S3, custom CDN) WILL be rejected by
+the upstream API. The ARK URL has a 24h TTL — run erasure before it
+expires.
+
+Usage:
+    erase_subtitles.py --video-url "<ARK url>"
+    erase_subtitles.py --task-id <chameleon_task_id>      # resolve via generation_log.csv
+    erase_subtitles.py --result-json <path>               # extract from archived result
+    erase_subtitles.py --query <erase_task_id>            # query an existing erasure task
+
+Requires env: ECAP_PROXY_BASE_URL, LITELLM_API_BASE, LITELLM_API_KEY.
+Optional: ECAP_PROXY_API_KEY.
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import argparse
+import csv
+import json
+import os
+import re
+import sys
+import time
+from pathlib import Path
+
+try:
+    import httpx
+except ImportError as exc:  # pragma: no cover
+    raise SystemExit("httpx is required: pip install httpx") from exc
+
+
+# ecap-proxy route for Seedance 2.0 subtitle erasure. The proxy hides the
+# upstream ModelArk MediaKit endpoint behind a seedance-namespaced URL and
+# uses the same LiteLLM dual-auth headers as chameleon_generate.
+ERASE_BASE_PATH = "/video/seedance/subtitle-erasure"
+SUBMIT_PATH = ERASE_BASE_PATH + "/tasks"
+QUERY_PATH_TEMPLATE = ERASE_BASE_PATH + "/tasks/{task_id}"
+
+DEFAULT_POLL_INTERVAL = 30.0
+DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 10800.0  # 3h, accommodates worst-case queueing
+DEFAULT_ARCHIVE_ROOT = "~/openclaw/chameleon/generations"
+INIT_HINT = "initial"  # matches "initializing" AND backend's "initialing" typo
+
+# Seedance ARK output URL signatures per the upstream contract.
+ARK_URL_PATTERNS = [
+    re.compile(r"^https?://ark-acg-[^/]+\.tos-[^/]+\.volces\.com/", re.IGNORECASE),
+    re.compile(r"^https?://ark-acg-[^/]+\.bytepluses\.com/", re.IGNORECASE),
+]
+
+
+def load_proxy_env() -> tuple[str, str, str, str | None]:
+    proxy_base = os.environ.get("ECAP_PROXY_BASE_URL", "").strip().rstrip("/")
+    litellm_base = os.environ.get("LITELLM_API_BASE", "").strip()
+    litellm_key = os.environ.get("LITELLM_API_KEY", "").strip()
+    proxy_key = os.environ.get("ECAP_PROXY_API_KEY", "").strip() or None
+    missing = [
+        name
+        for name, value in (
+            ("ECAP_PROXY_BASE_URL", proxy_base),
+            ("LITELLM_API_BASE", litellm_base),
+            ("LITELLM_API_KEY", litellm_key),
+        )
+        if not value
+    ]
+    if missing:
+        raise SystemExit(f"Missing required env vars: {', '.join(missing)}")
+    return proxy_base, litellm_base, litellm_key, proxy_key
+
+
+def proxy_headers(litellm_base: str, litellm_key: str, proxy_key: str | None) -> dict[str, str]:
+    headers = {
+        "X-Litellm-Api-Base": litellm_base,
+        "X-Litellm-Api-Key": litellm_key,
+        "Content-Type": "application/json",
+        "User-Agent": "ecap-skill/1.0",
+    }
+    if proxy_key:
+        headers["X-Proxy-Key"] = proxy_key
+    return headers
+
+
+def looks_like_ark_url(url: str) -> bool:
+    return any(p.match(url) for p in ARK_URL_PATTERNS)
+
+
+def lookup_video_url_by_task_id(task_id: str, archive_root: str) -> str:
+    """Resolve a chameleon generation task_id to its ARK video_url via generation_log.csv."""
+    log_path = Path(archive_root).expanduser().resolve() / "generation_log.csv"
+    if not log_path.exists():
+        raise SystemExit(
+            f"Cannot find generation_log.csv at {log_path}; "
+            f"pass --video-url or --result-json directly."
+        )
+    with log_path.open("r", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
+        for row in csv.DictReader(fh):
+            if row.get("task_id") == task_id:
+                url = (row.get("video_url") or "").strip()
+                if not url:
+                    raise SystemExit(f"task_id={task_id} found in log but video_url is empty")
+                return url
+    raise SystemExit(f"task_id={task_id} not found in {log_path}")
+
+
+def extract_video_url_from_result_json(path_str: str) -> str:
+    """Pull video_url from a chameleon-archived <task_id>.result.json."""
+    data = json.loads(Path(path_str).expanduser().read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+    stack = [data]
+    while stack:
+        node = stack.pop()
+        if isinstance(node, dict):
+            for k, v in node.items():
+                if k == "video_url":
+                    if isinstance(v, str) and v.startswith("http"):
+                        return v
+                    if isinstance(v, dict):
+                        url = v.get("url") or v.get("video_url")
+                        if isinstance(url, str) and url.startswith("http"):
+                            return url
+                stack.append(v)
+        elif isinstance(node, list):
+            stack.extend(node)
+    raise SystemExit(f"No video_url found in {path_str}")
+
+
+def submit(proxy_base: str, headers: dict[str, str], video_url: str, *, region: str | None, quiet: bool) -> str:
+    body = {"video_url": video_url}
+    url = proxy_base + SUBMIT_PATH
+    params = {"region": region} if region else None
+    while True:
+        with httpx.Client(timeout=60) as client:
+            response = client.post(url, headers=headers, json=body, params=params)
+        try:
+            payload = response.json()
+        except ValueError:
+            payload = {"_raw": response.text[:500]}
+        if response.status_code == 200 and payload.get("success"):
+            return payload["task_id"]
+        msg = (payload.get("error") or {}).get("message") or payload.get("message") or ""
+        if INIT_HINT in msg.lower():
+            if not quiet:
+                print("  system initializing, retry in 30s...", file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
+            time.sleep(30)
+            continue
+        raise SystemExit(
+            f"submit failed: HTTP {response.status_code} {json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False)}"
+        )
+
+
+def query(proxy_base: str, headers: dict[str, str], task_id: str, *, region: str | None = None) -> dict:
+    url = proxy_base + QUERY_PATH_TEMPLATE.format(task_id=task_id)
+    params = {"region": region} if region else None
+    with httpx.Client(timeout=60) as client:
+        response = client.get(url, headers=headers, params=params)
+    if response.status_code != 200:
+        raise SystemExit(f"query failed: HTTP {response.status_code} {response.text[:500]}")
+    return response.json()
+
+
+def poll_until_done(
+    proxy_base: str,
+    headers: dict[str, str],
+    task_id: str,
+    *,
+    region: str | None,
+    interval: float,
+    timeout: float,
+    quiet: bool,
+) -> dict:
+    deadline = time.time() + timeout
+    last_status = None
+    while time.time() < deadline:
+        resp = query(proxy_base, headers, task_id, region=region)
+        s = resp.get("status")
+        if s != last_status and not quiet:
+            print(f"  status={s}", file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
+            last_status = s
+        if s in ("completed", "failed"):
+            return resp
+        time.sleep(interval)
+    raise TimeoutError(f"polling timeout after {timeout}s; last status={last_status}")
+
+
+def main() -> int:
+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
+        description=__doc__,
+        formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
+    )
+    src = parser.add_mutually_exclusive_group(required=True)
+    src.add_argument("--video-url", help="Direct Seedance ARK video URL (24h TTL)")
+    src.add_argument("--task-id", help="Chameleon generation task_id; resolves video_url via generation_log.csv")
+    src.add_argument("--result-json", help="Path to an archived <task_id>.result.json")
+    src.add_argument("--query", metavar="ERASE_TASK_ID", help="Query an existing erasure task (skip submit/poll)")
+    parser.add_argument("--submit-only", action="store_true", help="Submit and print erase_task_id; don't poll")
+    parser.add_argument("--poll-interval", type=float, default=DEFAULT_POLL_INTERVAL)
+    parser.add_argument(
+        "--timeout",
+        type=float,
+        default=DEFAULT_TIMEOUT,
+        help=f"Max wait in seconds (default {int(DEFAULT_TIMEOUT)}s = 3h)",
+    )
+    parser.add_argument(
+        "--archive-root",
+        default=DEFAULT_ARCHIVE_ROOT,
+        help=f"Chameleon archive root for --task-id lookup (default: {DEFAULT_ARCHIVE_ROOT})",
+    )
+    parser.add_argument(
+        "--region",
+        choices=["ap-southeast-1", "cn-beijing"],
+        default=None,
+        help=(
+            "Optional upstream region passed to ecap-proxy. "
+            "Default is omitted (proxy chooses; currently ap-southeast-1 / BytePlus). "
+            "Pass cn-beijing for Volcengine China."
+        ),
+    )
+    parser.add_argument("--json", action="store_true", help="Emit final JSON only, no progress on stderr")
+    args = parser.parse_args()
+
+    proxy_base, litellm_base, litellm_key, proxy_key = load_proxy_env()
+    headers = proxy_headers(litellm_base, litellm_key, proxy_key)
+    quiet = args.json
+
+    if args.query:
+        resp = query(proxy_base, headers, args.query, region=args.region)
+        print(json.dumps(resp, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
+        s = resp.get("status")
+        return 0 if s == "completed" else (2 if s == "failed" else 1)
+
+    if args.video_url:
+        video_url = args.video_url
+    elif args.task_id:
+        video_url = lookup_video_url_by_task_id(args.task_id, args.archive_root)
+        if not quiet:
+            print(f"resolved task_id={args.task_id} → video_url={video_url[:80]}...", file=sys.stderr)
+    elif args.result_json:
+        video_url = extract_video_url_from_result_json(args.result_json)
+    else:
+        raise SystemExit("no source flag provided")  # unreachable; mutex group + required=True
+
+    if not looks_like_ark_url(video_url):
+        print(
+            f"[erase_subtitles] ⚠ video_url does not look like a Seedance ARK URL: {video_url[:80]}...\n"
+            "  MediaKit only accepts ark-acg-*.tos-*.volces.com / ark-acg-*.bytepluses.com origins.\n"
+            "  Re-hosted URLs (R2, S3, custom CDN) WILL be rejected. Continuing anyway.",
+            file=sys.stderr,
+        )
+
+    if not quiet:
+        print("submitting subtitle-erase task...", file=sys.stderr)
+    task_id = submit(proxy_base, headers, video_url, region=args.region, quiet=quiet)
+    if not quiet:
+        print(f"erase_task_id={task_id}", file=sys.stderr)
+
+    if args.submit_only:
+        print(json.dumps({"erase_task_id": task_id}, ensure_ascii=False))
+        return 0
+
+    try:
+        resp = poll_until_done(
+            proxy_base, headers, task_id,
+            region=args.region, interval=args.poll_interval, timeout=args.timeout, quiet=quiet,
+        )
+    except TimeoutError as e:
+        print(str(e), file=sys.stderr)
+        return 3
+
+    print(json.dumps(resp, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
+    return 0 if resp.get("status") == "completed" else 2
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    sys.exit(main())

+#!/usr/bin/env python3
+"""seedance-runner — Execution layer for Seedance 2.0 Pro chunk generation.
+
+Reads a generation_plan.json produced by any strategy-layer workflow (A/B/C)
+and concurrently submits + polls all chunks, downloading the resulting mp4s.
+
+Input:  generation_plan.json  (see references/generation-plan-schema.md)
+Output: <out-dir>/chunk_NN.mp4 files  (out-dir IS the chunks directory)
+        <run-dir>/seedance_results.json  (state, lives one level up from chunks)
+
+Usage:
+    python3 run_chunks.py \
+        --plan  runs/run-01/generation_plan.json \
+        --out-dir runs/run-01/chunks
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import argparse
+import concurrent.futures
+import json
+import os
+import sys
+import time
+import urllib.request
+from pathlib import Path
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Env validation
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+_REQUIRED_ENV = ["USER_INTERNAL_TOKEN", "ECAP_PROXY_BASE_URL",
+                 "LITELLM_API_BASE", "LITELLM_API_KEY"]
+
+
+def _check_env() -> None:
+    missing = [k for k in _REQUIRED_ENV if not os.environ.get(k)]
+    if missing:
+        sys.exit(f"[seedance-runner] Missing env vars: {', '.join(missing)}")
+
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Auth headers (mirrors chameleon/scripts/chameleon_generate.py proxy_headers())
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+def _proxy_headers(content_type: bool = False) -> dict[str, str]:
+    """Return headers required by the ecap-proxy Seedance endpoint.
+
+    Matches chameleon's proxy_headers() — uses X-Litellm-* for routing,
+    not Authorization Bearer (which causes 403 on some proxy paths).
+    USER_INTERNAL_TOKEN is passed as X-Litellm-Api-Key when LITELLM_API_KEY
+    is the user token (the two are equivalent in this environment).
+    """
+    h = {
+        "X-Litellm-Api-Base": os.environ["LITELLM_API_BASE"],
+        "X-Litellm-Api-Key":  os.environ["LITELLM_API_KEY"],
+        "User-Agent":          "seedance-runner/1.0",
+    }
+    if content_type:
+        h["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
+    return h
+
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Video URL extraction (recursive, mirrors chameleon's find_video_url())
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+def _find_video_url(obj) -> str:
+    """Recursively search for a video URL in any nested dict/list structure."""
+    if isinstance(obj, dict):
+        # Primary: video_url key with http value
+        if "video_url" in obj and isinstance(obj["video_url"], str) and obj["video_url"].startswith("http"):
+            return obj["video_url"]
+        # Nested video_url object
+        if obj.get("type") == "video_url":
+            nested = obj.get("video_url")
+            if isinstance(nested, dict):
+                url = nested.get("url") or nested.get("video_url")
+                if isinstance(url, str) and url.startswith("http"):
+                    return url
+        # Fallback: url or download_url ending in .mp4
+        for key in ("url", "download_url"):
+            val = obj.get(key)
+            if isinstance(val, str) and val.startswith("http") and ".mp4" in val:
+                return val
+        # Recurse into values
+        for v in obj.values():
+            found = _find_video_url(v)
+            if found:
+                return found
+    elif isinstance(obj, list):
+        for item in obj:
+            found = _find_video_url(item)
+            if found:
+                return found
+    return ""
+
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Submit
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+def _submit_chunk(chunk: dict, out_dir: Path) -> tuple[int, str]:
+    """Submit one Seedance task. Returns (index, task_id)."""
+    idx        = chunk["index"]
+    prompt     = chunk["prompt"]
+    duration   = int(min(chunk.get("duration", 10), 15))
+    ratio      = chunk.get("ratio", "9:16")
+    resolution = chunk.get("resolution", "720p")
+    ref_asset  = chunk.get("reference_asset", "")
+
+    base = os.environ["ECAP_PROXY_BASE_URL"].rstrip("/")
+
+    # Build content array — Seedance 2.0 requires content[] format
+    content: list[dict] = [{"type": "text", "text": prompt}]
+    if ref_asset:
+        content.append({
+            "type":      "image_url",
+            "image_url": {"url": ref_asset},
+            "role":      "reference_image",
+        })
+
+    # ── Problem 1 fix: force no on-screen subtitles/text ─────────────────────
+    # Seedance sometimes renders on-screen text when the prompt contains dialogue.
+    # Always prepend the no-subtitle instruction regardless of prompt content.
+    NO_SUBTITLE_PREFIX = (
+        "【画面要求】画面中绝对不能出现任何文字、字幕、贴纸、台词字幕条、数字水印或任何"
+        "屏幕文字叠加。所有字幕均在后期通过 ASS 烧录。"
+        "IMPORTANT: No subtitles, no captions, no text overlays, no on-screen typography, "
+        "no watermarks, no stickers of any kind in the video frames. "
+        "All text is added in post-production only. "
+    )
+    # ── Problem 3 fix: no BGM — only human VO + ambient SFX ────────────────────
+    # BGM is sourced from the original reference video via Demucs and mixed in post.
+    NO_BGM_PREFIX = (
+        "【音频说明】本片段只需人声口播VO和自然环境音效，"
+        "不要生成任何背景音乐(BGM)，不要加入任何节奏感或旋律性音乐。"
+        "Audio: human voiceover VO + natural ambient SFX only. "
+        "No background music, no BGM, no soundtrack, no melodic music. "
+    )
+    if "绝对不能出现任何文字" not in prompt:
+        prompt = NO_SUBTITLE_PREFIX + prompt
+    if "不要生成任何背景音乐" not in prompt:
+        prompt = NO_BGM_PREFIX + prompt
+    content[0]["text"] = prompt
+
+    payload: dict = {
+        "model":               chunk.get("model", "dreamina-seedance-2-0-260128"),
+        "content":             content,
+        "duration":            duration,
+        "ratio":               ratio,
+        "resolution":          resolution,
+        "generate_audio":      True,   # human VO + ambient SFX only; BGM added post via Demucs
+        "generate_subtitles":  False,  # subtitles burned in post via subtitle_burn.py
+        "watermark":           False,
+    }
+
+    # Save payload for debugging
+    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    (out_dir / f"chunk_{idx:02d}_payload.json").write_text(
+        json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
+    )
+
+    req = urllib.request.Request(
+        f"{base}/video/seedance/tasks",
+        data=json.dumps(payload, ensure_ascii=False).encode("utf-8"),
+        headers=_proxy_headers(content_type=True),
+    )
+    with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as r:
+        resp = json.loads(r.read())
+
+    tid = resp.get("id")
+    if not tid:
+        raise RuntimeError(f"Chunk {idx}: Seedance returned no task id — {resp}")
+
+    print(f"  [submit] chunk {idx:02d} → task_id={tid}", file=sys.stderr)
+    return idx, tid
+
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Poll + download
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+def _poll_chunk(task_id: str, idx: int, out_dir: Path,
+                has_ref_video: bool = False,
+                poll_interval: int = 20, timeout: int = 1800) -> str:
+    """Poll until task succeeds; download mp4 to out_dir/chunk_NN.mp4."""
+    base = os.environ["ECAP_PROXY_BASE_URL"].rstrip("/")
+    # Mirror chameleon: include has_reference_video query param
+    ref_flag = "true" if has_ref_video else "false"
+    poll_url = f"{base}/video/seedance/tasks/{task_id}?has_reference_video={ref_flag}"
+    headers  = _proxy_headers()
+
+    deadline = time.time() + timeout
+    while time.time() < deadline:
+        req = urllib.request.Request(poll_url, headers=headers)
+        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=30) as r:
+            resp = json.loads(r.read())
+
+        status = resp.get("status", "").lower()
+
+        if status == "succeeded":
+            url = _find_video_url(resp)
+            if not url:
+                raise RuntimeError(f"Chunk {idx} succeeded but no video_url found: {resp}")
+            out_mp4 = out_dir / f"chunk_{idx:02d}.mp4"
+            print(f"  [poll]   chunk {idx:02d} done → downloading…", file=sys.stderr)
+            urllib.request.urlretrieve(url, str(out_mp4))
+            print(f"  [poll]   chunk {idx:02d} saved → {out_mp4}", file=sys.stderr)
+            return str(out_mp4)
+
+        elif status in ("failed", "cancelled", "expired"):
+            raise RuntimeError(f"Chunk {idx} task {task_id} {status}: {resp}")
+
+        else:
+            print(f"  [poll]   chunk {idx:02d} status={status!r}, "
+                  f"retry in {poll_interval}s…", file=sys.stderr)
+            time.sleep(poll_interval)
+
+    raise TimeoutError(f"Chunk {idx} timed out after {timeout}s (task_id={task_id})")
+
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Resumable state helpers
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+def _state_path(out_dir: Path) -> Path:
+    """State file lives in parent of chunks dir (the run directory)."""
+    return out_dir.parent / "seedance_results.json"
+
+
+def _load_state(out_dir: Path) -> dict:
+    p = _state_path(out_dir)
+    if p.is_file():
+        return json.loads(p.read_text())
+    return {"task_ids": {}, "mp4_paths": {}, "done": False}
+
+
+def _save_state(state: dict, out_dir: Path) -> None:
+    _state_path(out_dir).write_text(
+        json.dumps(state, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
+    )
+
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Main
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+def run(plan_path: Path, out_dir: Path,
+        max_workers: int | None = None,
+        poll_interval: int = 20,
+        timeout: int = 1800) -> dict:
+    """Run all chunks in plan. Returns final state dict."""
+    _check_env()
+
+    plan   = json.loads(plan_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+    chunks = plan["chunks"]
+    mw     = max_workers or plan.get("seedance", {}).get("max_workers", 3)
+
+    # Detect whether any chunk has a reference_video (affects poll URL)
+    has_ref_video = any(c.get("reference_video") for c in chunks)
+
+    # out_dir IS the chunks directory; mkdir and load state
+    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+    state = _load_state(out_dir)
+
+    if state.get("done"):
+        print("[seedance-runner] Already done; skipping.", file=sys.stderr)
+        return state
+
+    # ── Submit phase ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+    pending_submit = [c for c in chunks
+                      if str(c["index"]) not in state["task_ids"]]
+
+    if pending_submit:
+        print(f"[seedance-runner] Submitting {len(pending_submit)} chunk(s) "
+              f"(max_workers={mw})…", file=sys.stderr)
+        errors: list[str] = []
+        with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=mw) as pool:
+            futures = {
+                pool.submit(_submit_chunk, c, out_dir): c["index"]
+                for c in pending_submit
+            }
+            for future in concurrent.futures.as_completed(futures):
+                idx = futures[future]
+                try:
+                    _, tid = future.result()
+                    state["task_ids"][str(idx)] = tid
+                    _save_state(state, out_dir)
+                except Exception as exc:
+                    errors.append(f"chunk {idx}: {exc}")
+
+        if errors:
+            sys.exit("[seedance-runner] Submit errors:\n" + "\n".join(errors))
+    else:
+        print("[seedance-runner] All chunks already submitted; skipping submit phase.",
+              file=sys.stderr)
+
+    # ── Poll phase ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+    pending_poll = {int(k): v for k, v in state["task_ids"].items()
+                    if str(k) not in state["mp4_paths"]}
+
+    if pending_poll:
+        print(f"[seedance-runner] Polling {len(pending_poll)} task(s)…", file=sys.stderr)
+        errors = []
+        with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=mw) as pool:
+            futures = {
+                pool.submit(
+                    _poll_chunk, tid, idx, out_dir,
+                    has_ref_video, poll_interval, timeout
+                ): idx
+                for idx, tid in pending_poll.items()
+            }
+            for future in concurrent.futures.as_completed(futures):
+                idx = futures[future]
+                try:
+                    path = future.result()
+                    state["mp4_paths"][str(idx)] = path
+                    _save_state(state, out_dir)
+                except Exception as exc:
+                    errors.append(f"chunk {idx}: {exc}")
+
+        if errors:
+            sys.exit("[seedance-runner] Poll errors:\n" + "\n".join(errors))
+    else:
+        print("[seedance-runner] All chunks already polled; skipping poll phase.",
+              file=sys.stderr)
+
+    state["done"] = True
+    _save_state(state, out_dir)
+    print(f"[seedance-runner] Done — {len(state['mp4_paths'])} chunk(s) downloaded.",
+          file=sys.stderr)
+    return state
+
+
+def main() -> None:
+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Seedance chunk runner")
+    ap.add_argument("--plan",          required=True, help="Path to generation_plan.json")
+    ap.add_argument("--out-dir",       required=True, help="Chunks output directory (IS the chunks dir)")
+    ap.add_argument("--max-workers",   type=int, default=None,
+                    help="Concurrent workers (overrides plan value)")
+    ap.add_argument("--poll-interval", type=int, default=20,
+                    help="Poll interval in seconds (default 20)")
+    ap.add_argument("--timeout",       type=int, default=1800,
+                    help="Per-chunk timeout in seconds (default 1800)")
+    ap.add_argument("--skip-validate", action="store_true",
+                    help="Skip pre-flight validation (not recommended)")
+    args = ap.parse_args()
+
+    # ── Problem 2 fix: pre-flight validation before any API calls ──────────────
+    # Checks: no-subtitle instruction, no-BGM instruction, VO timestamp
+    # overlap within chunks, cross-chunk VO content bleed, duration limits.
+    if not args.skip_validate:
+        try:
+            from validate_plan import validate_from_plan
+            errors = validate_from_plan(Path(args.plan))
+            if errors:
+                print("[seedance-runner] ❌ Pre-flight validation failed:", file=sys.stderr)
+                for e in errors:
+                    print(f"  • {e}", file=sys.stderr)
+                sys.exit(
+                    "[seedance-runner] Fix the issues above before submitting. "
+                    "Use --skip-validate to bypass (not recommended)."
+                )
+            else:
+                print("[seedance-runner] ✅ Pre-flight validation passed", file=sys.stderr)
+        except ImportError:
+            print("[seedance-runner] WARNING: validate_plan.py not found, skipping validation",
+                  file=sys.stderr)
+
+    out_dir = Path(args.out_dir)
+    out_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
+
+    state = run(
+        plan_path     = Path(args.plan),
+        out_dir       = out_dir,
+        max_workers   = args.max_workers,
+        poll_interval = args.poll_interval,
+        timeout       = args.timeout,
+    )
+
+    # Print ordered mp4 paths to stdout for downstream callers
+    ordered = [state["mp4_paths"][str(i)]
+               for i in sorted(int(k) for k in state["mp4_paths"])]
+    print(json.dumps({"mp4_paths": ordered}, ensure_ascii=False))
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    main()

@@ -0,0 +1,238 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3
+"""validate_plan.py — Pre-flight check for generation_plan.json before Seedance submission.
+
+Catches common mistakes that cause bad output:
+  1. VO timestamp overlap between adjacent chunks (content bleeding across cuts)
+  2. VO timestamp gaps > 1s within a chunk (unintended silence)
+  3. Chunk duration > 15s (Seedance hard limit)
+  4. Missing required fields (prompt, duration, index)
+  5. Total declared VO duration vs chunk duration mismatch (>20% off)
+
+Usage:
+    python3 validate_plan.py --plan runs/r01/generation_plan.json
+    python3 validate_plan.py --chunks chunk_prompts.json --durations 11,11,13
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import argparse
+import json
+import re
+import sys
+from pathlib import Path
+
+
+# ─── VO timestamp extraction ────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+_TS_RE = re.compile(
+    r"\[(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*[-–]\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*秒\]",
+)
+
+# VO section header markers (any of these delimit the VO block)
+_VO_SECTION_MARKERS = ("【口播台词 VO】", "【口播台词VO】", "【口播台词】", "《口播台词")
+# Scene section header markers (timestamp lines after these are NOT VO)
+_SCENE_SECTION_MARKERS = ("【画面内容】", "【画面按以下顺序呈现】", "【画面】", "画面按以下顺序呈现")
+
+def extract_vo_segments(prompt: str) -> list[tuple[float, float, str]]:
+    """Return (start, end, line) tuples ONLY from the VO section of a prompt.
+
+    Prompts use the same [N-Xs] timestamp format for both VO lines and scene
+    description lines. This function scopes extraction to the VO section only
+    (between VO section header and scene section header) to avoid false positives.
+    """
+    # Find VO section start
+    vo_start = -1
+    for marker in _VO_SECTION_MARKERS:
+        idx = prompt.find(marker)
+        if idx != -1:
+            vo_start = idx
+            break
+
+    # Find scene section start (marks end of VO region)
+    scene_start = len(prompt)
+    for marker in _SCENE_SECTION_MARKERS:
+        idx = prompt.find(marker)
+        if idx != -1 and idx > (vo_start if vo_start != -1 else 0):
+            scene_start = min(scene_start, idx)
+
+    # If no explicit VO section, fall back: only lines with 「」 quote marks
+    def is_vo_line(line: str) -> bool:
+        return "「" in line or "」" in line or "（语气" in line or "（加重" in line
+
+    segments = []
+    for m in _TS_RE.finditer(prompt):
+        pos = m.start()
+        if vo_start != -1:
+            # Only within VO section boundaries
+            if pos < vo_start or pos >= scene_start:
+                continue
+        else:
+            # No explicit VO section — require dialogue markers
+            line_end = prompt.find("\n", m.end())
+            line = prompt[m.start(): line_end if line_end != -1 else m.end() + 120]
+            if not is_vo_line(line):
+                continue
+
+        start, end = float(m.group(1)), float(m.group(2))
+        line_end = prompt.find("\n", m.end())
+        line = prompt[m.start(): line_end if line_end != -1 else m.end() + 120]
+        segments.append((start, end, line.strip()))
+    return segments
+
+
+# ─── Validators ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+def check_chunk(idx: int, prompt: str, duration: float) -> list[str]:
+    errors: list[str] = []
+
+    # 1. Duration limit
+    if duration > 15:
+        errors.append(f"chunk {idx}: duration={duration}s exceeds Seedance 15s limit")
+
+    # 2. Missing no-subtitle instruction
+    if "不能出现任何文字" not in prompt and "No subtitles" not in prompt:
+        errors.append(
+            f"chunk {idx}: missing no-subtitle instruction — "
+            "add '画面中绝对不能出现任何文字...' or 'No subtitles...' to prompt"
+        )
+
+    # 3. Missing no-BGM instruction (accept any common variant)
+    _BGM_VARIANTS = (
+        "不要生成任何背景音乐", "无BGM", "No background music",
+        "no BGM", "不要生成任何节奏感", "不要加入任何节奏感", "no soundtrack",
+        "No BGM", "没有背景音乐",
+    )
+    if not any(v in prompt for v in _BGM_VARIANTS):
+        errors.append(
+            f"chunk {idx}: missing no-BGM instruction — "
+            "add '不要生成任何背景音乐(BGM)' or 'No background music' to prompt"
+        )
+
+    # 4. VO segment internal consistency
+    segs = extract_vo_segments(prompt)
+    if segs:
+        prev_end = 0.0
+        for s_start, s_end, line in segs:
+            if s_start < prev_end - 0.1:
+                errors.append(
+                    f"chunk {idx}: VO timestamp overlap — "
+                    f"[{s_start}-{s_end}秒] starts before previous end {prev_end:.1f}s\n"
+                    f"  line: {line[:80]}"
+                )
+            if s_end > duration + 0.5:
+                errors.append(
+                    f"chunk {idx}: VO timestamp [{s_start}-{s_end}秒] "
+                    f"exceeds chunk duration {duration}s"
+                )
+            prev_end = s_end
+
+        # 5. VO coverage vs chunk duration (warn if total VO < 60% of chunk)
+        total_vo = sum(e - s for s, e, _ in segs)
+        if total_vo < duration * 0.6:
+            errors.append(
+                f"chunk {idx}: WARNING — VO coverage {total_vo:.1f}s covers only "
+                f"{total_vo/duration*100:.0f}% of {duration}s chunk; "
+                "consider filling gaps to avoid silent sections"
+            )
+
+    return errors
+
+
+def check_cross_chunk_overlap(
+    chunks: list[tuple[int, str, float]]
+) -> list[str]:
+    """Check that VO content doesn't semantically bleed across chunk boundaries.
+
+    Detects when the last VO line of chunk N and first VO line of chunk N+1
+    contain identical or near-identical text (substring match ≥ 10 chars).
+    """
+    errors: list[str] = []
+    prev_last_line = ""
+    prev_idx = -1
+
+    for idx, prompt, _ in chunks:
+        segs = extract_vo_segments(prompt)
+        if not segs:
+            prev_last_line = ""
+            prev_idx = idx
+            continue
+
+        first_line = segs[0][2]
+        last_line  = segs[-1][2]
+
+        if prev_last_line and len(prev_last_line) >= 10:
+            # Check for ≥10-char substring overlap
+            for length in range(min(len(prev_last_line), len(first_line), 30), 9, -1):
+                for start in range(len(prev_last_line) - length + 1):
+                    fragment = prev_last_line[start:start + length]
+                    if fragment in first_line:
+                        errors.append(
+                            f"chunk {prev_idx}→{idx}: possible VO content overlap — "
+                            f"'{fragment}' appears in both last line of chunk {prev_idx} "
+                            f"and first line of chunk {idx}\n"
+                            f"  chunk {prev_idx} last: {prev_last_line[:80]}\n"
+                            f"  chunk {idx} first:  {first_line[:80]}"
+                        )
+                        break
+                else:
+                    continue
+                break
+
+        prev_last_line = last_line
+        prev_idx = idx
+
+    return errors
+
+
+# ─── Main ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+def validate_from_plan(plan_path: Path) -> list[str]:
+    plan = json.loads(plan_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+    chunks_raw = []
+    for c in plan.get("chunks", []):
+        idx      = c.get("index", 0)
+        prompt   = c.get("prompt", "")
+        duration = float(c.get("duration", 10))
+        chunks_raw.append((idx, prompt, duration))
+    return _run_checks(chunks_raw)
+
+
+def validate_from_prompts(prompts: list[str], durations: list[float]) -> list[str]:
+    chunks_raw = [(i, p, d) for i, (p, d) in enumerate(zip(prompts, durations))]
+    return _run_checks(chunks_raw)
+
+
+def _run_checks(chunks_raw: list[tuple[int, str, float]]) -> list[str]:
+    all_errors: list[str] = []
+    for idx, prompt, duration in chunks_raw:
+        all_errors.extend(check_chunk(idx, prompt, duration))
+    all_errors.extend(check_cross_chunk_overlap(chunks_raw))
+    return all_errors
+
+
+def main() -> None:
+    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Validate generation plan before Seedance submission")
+    ap.add_argument("--plan",      help="Path to generation_plan.json")
+    ap.add_argument("--chunks",    help="Path to chunk_prompts.json (array of prompt strings)")
+    ap.add_argument("--durations", help="Comma-separated durations matching --chunks, e.g. 11,11,13")
+    args = ap.parse_args()
+
+    if args.plan:
+        errors = validate_from_plan(Path(args.plan))
+    elif args.chunks:
+        prompts = json.loads(Path(args.chunks).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
+        durs = [float(d) for d in args.durations.split(",")] if args.durations else [10.0] * len(prompts)
+        errors = validate_from_prompts(prompts, durs)
+    else:
+        ap.error("Provide --plan or --chunks")
+
+    if errors:
+        print(f"[validate_plan] ❌ {len(errors)} issue(s) found:\n", file=sys.stderr)
+        for e in errors:
+            print(f"  • {e}\n", file=sys.stderr)
+        sys.exit(1)
+    else:
+        print("[validate_plan] ✅ All checks passed", file=sys.stderr)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    main()

+---
+name: storyboard-replicate
+description: >
+  [⭐ RECOMMENDED — Workflow C] Most balanced and efficient workflow. Pure visual cloning
+  pipeline. Given a reference ad video, Gemini deeply analyses
+  the shot list; GPT Image 2 builds a full production storyboard; Seedance 2.0 Pro
+  re-generates every chunk using the storyboard as a reference image; ffmpeg stitches
+  the result; Demucs extracts BGM from the original and remixes it onto the new video;
+  ASS subtitles are burned in with the shared dual-layer shadow spec.
+  Use when the user wants to "复刻这个视频" without specifying element substitution.
+  Trigger phrases: 复刻这个广告, 仿照这个视频, 参考这个视频做一个, replicate this ad.
+---
+
+# Storyboard Replicate — Workflow C
+
+Full pipeline: reference video → Gemini analysis → GPT Image 2 storyboard →
+Seedance chunked generation → ffmpeg concat → Demucs BGM mix → ASS subtitle burn.
+
+```
+用户输入（本地文件 或 URL）
+      │
+      ▼
+[Step 0] prepare-source — 报取+压缩 ≤ 10MB    (prepare-source/prepare.sh)
+      │
+      ▼
+[Step 1] Gemini 3.1 Pro — deep shot-by-shot analysis  (analyze_video_gemini.py)
+      │
+      ▼
+[Step 2] [PAUSE] Agent presents summary → user confirms / tweaks direction
+      │
+      ▼
+[Step 3] GPT Image 2 — 16:9 production storyboard      (designer skill)
+      │
+      ▼
+[Step 4] Asset registration — storyboard → asset://ID  (chameleon skill)
+      │
+      ▼
+[Step 5] Seedance 2.0 Pro — concurrent chunked gen      (run_pipeline.py)
+      │  max 15s/chunk; each chunk gets storyboard as reference_image
+      ▼
+[Step 6] ffmpeg concat → stitched.mp4
+         Demucs BGM extraction from source + audio mix  (audio_postprocess_cli.py)
+      │
+      ▼
+[Step 7] ASS subtitle burn → final_with_subtitles.mp4
+         (shared spec: 方正金陵 Bold 64px, 语义LLM分段, 词级forced-align时间轴)
+```
+
+---
+
+## Step 0 — 预处理输入视频（共享 A/B/C）
+
+用户输入可以是本地文件或任意 URL（直链 mp4、Bilibili、抖音、YouTube等）。
+
+```bash
+SOURCE=$(bash .agents/skills/prepare-source/scripts/prepare.sh \
+  -i "<本地路径或视频URL>" \
+  -o runs/<run>/source.mp4)
+```
+
+`$SOURCE` 即可直接传给后续所有分析脚本。详见 `prepare-source` skill。
+
+---
+
+## Step 1 — Video Analysis
+
+```bash
+uv run --with litellm \
+  python3 .agents/skills/storyboard-replicate/scripts/analyze_video_gemini.py \
+  /path/to/reference.mp4  # 使用 Step 0 输出的 source.mp4
+```
+
+Output: `{"success": true, "content": "<analysis>"}` → saved as `analysis.json`.
+
+Full Gemini prompt: `references/analysis-prompt.md`
+
+---
+
+## Step 2 — User Confirmation (PAUSE)
+
+Present the analysis summary to the user:
+- Estimated duration and chunk plan (≤15s per chunk)
+- Key characters / products / scenes
+- Colour palette and visual style
+- Dialogue / VO lines detected
+
+Ask: **"是否按照这个分析复刻？有没有需要调整的地方？"**
+
+After confirmation:
+- Compose the storyboard prompt (see `references/storyboard-prompt-template.md`)
+- Compose chunk prompts (see `references/chunk-prompt-template.md`)
+- Write `storyboard_prompt.txt` and `chunk_prompts.json` into the run folder
+
+---
+
+## Storyboard & Chunk Prompt Rules (MANDATORY — apply to every generation)
+
+### Rule 1 — Storyboard must be a CLEAN reference image
+When writing the storyboard prompt for GPT Image 2, always include this instruction prominently:
+
+> "All storyboard panels must show PURE CLEAN SCENES with no text overlays, no subtitles, no captions,
+> no stickers, no UI elements, no watermarks, no on-screen typography of any kind.
+> Panels are reference images for video generation only — all text and graphics are added in post-production."
+
+Storyboard panels should occupy no more than 60% of the image area — leave space for the left column
+(character references) and right column (production notes). Do not make panels fill the entire canvas.
+
+### Rule 2 — Every chunk prompt MUST include VO lines with timestamp + delivery notes
+
+Each chunk prompt must have a dedicated `【口播台词 VO】` section placed AFTER the scene/action
+descriptions, structured as follows:
+
+```
+【口播台词 VO】
+声音风格：[年轻女性/中年女医生/...] 声线，语速 [快/中/慢]（约每分钟[N]字），
+声线[清亮甜美/沉稳专业/...] ，情绪[饱满/从容/...] ，类似[抖音AI配音/纪录片旁白/...]风格。
+
+[0-Xs] 「[台词原文]」（[语气描述：加重字眼、语调方向、情绪]）
+[Xs-Ys] 「[台词原文]」（[语气描述]）
+...
+```
+
+Rules:
+- Timestamps must map exactly to the scene segments above
+- Quote marks 「」 wrap the exact spoken text
+- Every line needs a parenthetical delivery note: which words to stress, tone direction, emotion
+- Doctor/authoritative segments must specify: slower pace, lapel mic ambience, warm professional tone
+- BGM instruction: ALWAYS include as first line of VO section:
+  `【背景音乐】无BGM。只要人声VO和自然环境音效，不要生成任何节奏感音乐。`
+
+### Rule 3 — No BGM in Seedance output
+Seedance `generate_audio: true` is used ONLY for human VO + ambient SFX.
+BGM is always sourced from the original reference video via Demucs separation and mixed in post.
+The `run_chunks.py` script auto-prepends the no-BGM instruction to every prompt.
+
+---
+
+## Step 3 — Storyboard Generation
+
+> ⚠️ **必读模板再写 prompt —— 不允许凭印象写**
+>
+> **在写任何故事板 prompt 之前，必须先执行：**
+> ```
+> read .agents/skills/storyboard-replicate/references/storyboard-prompt-template.md
+> ```
+> 然后用 Gemini 分析结果填充所有 `[INSERT ...]` 占位符。
+> **禁止自行撰写概括性版本**——脑海里记不住模板结构，会导致生成质量下降。
+>
+> **必填充的八个模块（缺少任何一个脚本会报错中止）：**
+> 1. `STORY CONTENT` — 视频叙事、人物、关键时刻、CTA
+> 2. `OVERALL STYLE` — 画面风格、调色风格
+> 3. `LAYOUT` — 分欺布局说明
+> 4. `CHARACTER` — 人物外貌、服装、道具
+> 5. `STORYBOARD` — 每个镇头的具体描述
+> 6. `LIGHTING` — 打光方案
+> 7. `AUDIO` — 音效、BGM、VO说明
+> 8. 同步写入 `storyboard_prompt.txt`（`run_pipeline.py` Step 3 会自动读取）
+
+Requires `~/.openclaw/skills/designer/scripts/image_generation_cli.py`.
+
+```bash
+# image_generation_cli.py 不接受 --output。它把路径打印到 stdout 最后一行。
+# run_pipeline.py Step 3 内部封装了正确调用和路径处理，直接跑 pipeline 即可：
+python3 .agents/skills/storyboard-replicate/scripts/run_pipeline.py \
+  --source source.mp4 \
+  --out-dir runs/<run-name>/ \
+  --from-step 3 --only-step 3
+```
+
+Template: `references/storyboard-prompt-template.md`
+
+---
+
+## Step 4 — Asset Registration (Critical)
+
+Always register before Seedance submission. Bypasses face-privacy rejection.
+
+```bash
+python3 ~/.openclaw/skills/chameleon/scripts/asset_register.py \
+  create-asset \
+  --local-file-path <out-dir>/storyboard.png \
+  --display-name "Storyboard-<run-name>" \
+  --wait --poll-interval 10 --timeout 300
+```
+
+Note the returned `asset_id`. Wait for `Status: Active` before proceeding.
+
+---
+
+## Step 5 — Seedance Chunked Generation
+
+**Duration limit: 15s max per chunk.**
+
+Chunking guide:
+
+| Video duration | Chunks |
+|---|---|
+| ≤ 15s | 1 |
+| 16–30s | 2 |
+| 31–45s | 3 |
+
+Write `chunk_prompts.json` — a JSON array of prompt strings, one per chunk.
+Template: `references/chunk-prompt-template.md`
+
+Each chunk prompt must:
+- Reference `图片1` panels: `"参考\`图片1\`中的分镜[前N格/后N格]构图"`
+- Describe the specific scenes for that time range
+- Specify camera movement per scene
+
+Run via pipeline (concurrent):
+```bash
+python3 .agents/skills/storyboard-replicate/scripts/run_pipeline.py \
+  --source reference.mp4 \
+  --out-dir runs/<run-name>/ \
+  --chunks 2 \
+  --from-step 5
+```
+
+⚠️ Generation takes 8–15 min per chunk. Always run as a subagent:
+```
+sessions_spawn mode="run", runTimeoutSeconds=900
+```
+
+
+> ⚠️ **字幕阶段强制约束 — 必须使用 pack 内置 skill，禁止自行实现**
+>
+> Seedance 所有 chunk 下载完成后，进入字幕流程时：
+> - **时间轴对齐**：必须调用 `video-transcribe/scripts/transcribe.sh`（内部使用 `zooclaw-forcedalign` 生成 word-level SRT）
+> - **字幕分段+烧录**：必须调用 `video-burn-subtitle/scripts/burn.sh`（内部使用 `llm_segment.py` + `srt_to_ass.py`）
+> - **禁止**：自写 ASS/SRT 生成逻辑、手动调 ffmpeg subtitles filter、使用 `subtitle_burn.py`（已废弃）
+>
+> 完整命令见本文件 "Subtitle Burn" 节。
+
+### Step 5.5 — 字幕擦除（on-demand，共享 A/B/C）
+
+Seedance 有时会将中文字幕烧入画面。触发条件：用户明确反馈（字幕乱码 / 有乱字幕 / erase subtitles）。
+
+```bash
+python3 .agents/skills/seedance-runner/scripts/erase_subtitles.py \
+  --video-url "<chunk ARK URL from seedance_results.json>"
+```
+
+返回的 `result.video_url` 下载后替换对应 `chunks/chunk_NN.mp4`，再继续 Step 6。
+
+> ⚠️ 必须使用原始 ARK URL（24h TTL）。擦除后输出的 chunk 码率可能是其他 chunk 的3−4倍，`concat.py` 会自动检测并重编码归一，无需手动处理。
+
+---
+
+## Step 6 — ffmpeg Concat + Demucs BGM Mix
+
+Handled automatically by `run_pipeline.py`. Calls
+`style-duplicate/../storyboard-studio/scripts/audio_postprocess_cli.py`.
+
+If `audio_postprocess_cli.py` is not available, falls back to copying the
+source audio track directly onto the stitched video.
+
+---
+
+> 🎙️ **音频纯净度要求**：`video-transcribe` 必须使用无 BGM 的干净音频。
+> - **首选**：在 `audio_postprocess`（BGM 混入）**之前**调用，传入 `stitched.mp4`（Seedance 原始合并，只有 VO + 环境音）
+> - **备选**：已混入 BGM 时，传入 `stitched_bgm.mp4` 并加 `--vocals-only` flag（Demucs 先分离人声再 ASR）
+> - ❌ 禁止：直接把 BGM 混音后的视频送 ASR（BGM 会严重干扰识别精度）
+
+## Step 7 — Subtitle Burn
+
+> 字幕烧录由三个共享 skill 完成（Workflow A/B/C 共用同一套）。
+
+**Pipeline**：`zooclaw-asr` 转录 → `video-transcribe` forced-align → `video-burn-subtitle` LLM分段+burn
+
+```bash
+export ZOOCLAW_FORCEDALIGN_GATEWAY_URL=https://forced-align.g.yesy.online
+
+# 1. ASR
+bash {skills}/zooclaw-asr/scripts/transcribe.sh \
+    "$STITCHED_BGM" -o transcript.txt -f text
+
+# 2. Forced align → word-level SRT
+bash {skills}/video-transcribe/scripts/transcribe.sh \
+    -i "$STITCHED_BGM" -o words.srt
+
+# 3. LLM 分段 + ASS burn
+bash {skills}/video-burn-subtitle/scripts/burn.sh \
+    -i "$STITCHED_BGM" -s words.srt \
+    --orientation portrait \
+    -o final_with_subtitles.mp4
+```
+
+| 参数 | 值 |
+|---|---|
+| 字体 | 方正金陵 Bold (fzjingling.ttf) |
+| 字号 | 64px (portrait) |
+| 每行最大字数 | 8 CJK 字符 |
+| 位置 | `pos(vw/2, vh×2/3)` |
+| 样式 | 白字无描边，黑色阴影 70% 透明度 -45° |
+| 时间精度 | 80ms 词级（forced align） |
+| 分段规则 | LLM 语义切割，语气词随前句，静默≥800ms 强制断句 |
+
+---
+
+## Full One-Shot Run
+
+```bash
+# Step 1 only (analysis):
+python3 run_pipeline.py --source ref.mp4 --out-dir runs/r01 --only-step 1
+
+# Steps 3–4 (storyboard + asset, after writing storyboard_prompt.txt):
+python3 run_pipeline.py --source ref.mp4 --out-dir runs/r01 --from-step 3 --only-step 4
+
+# Steps 5–7 (generate + audio + subs, after writing chunk_prompts.json):
+python3 run_pipeline.py --source ref.mp4 --out-dir runs/r01 --from-step 5
+```
+
+---
+
+## Run Folder Layout
+
+```
+runs/<run-name>/
+  manifest.json               ← stage tracking (auto-managed)
+  analysis.json               ← Step 1 Gemini output
+  storyboard_prompt.txt       ← written by agent before Step 3
+  storyboard.png              ← Step 3 output
+  chunk_prompts.json          ← written by agent before Step 5
+  chunk_00.mp4 … chunk_NN.mp4 ← Step 5 downloads
+  concat_list.txt
+  stitched.mp4                ← Step 6 concat
+  stitched_with_bgm.mp4       ← Step 6 audio mix
+  captions.ass                ← Step 7
+  final_with_subtitles.mp4    ← Step 7 final output ✅
+```
+
+---
+
+## Known Pitfalls
+
+1. **Face privacy rejection**: always register storyboard as asset; `asset://ID` bypasses the filter
+2. **Seedance 15s cap**: split longer videos into ≤15s chunks; never submit a single chunk >15s
+3. **Generation timeout**: `sessions_spawn` with `runTimeoutSeconds=900` for Step 5
+4. **Caption source**: Step 7 收看些 `stitched_bgm.mp4` 的实际 VO，由 `zooclaw-asr` 实时转录生成字幕。不再从 `generation_plan.json["captions"]` 读取字幕文本——那是导演意图，不是实际音频内容。
+5. **Demucs first run**: ~500MB model download; cached at `~/.cache/torch/hub/`
+6. **Designer skill path**: `~/.openclaw/skills/designer/` must be installed
+7. **Chameleon skill path**: `~/.openclaw/skills/chameleon/` must be installed
+8. **Audio fallback**: if `audio_postprocess_cli.py` is missing, source audio is copied directly (no BGM separation)

+# Gemini Video Analysis Prompt
+
+This is the full prompt used in Step 1 to extract detailed storyboard data from a reference video.
+Pass this as the text message alongside the video (base64-encoded as `data:video/mp4;base64,...`).
+
+```
+你是国际一流的电影分镜师、广告片导演和视觉开发艺术指导。请对这个视频进行极其详细的专业分析，按照以下维度全面输出：
+
+## 1. 视频基本信息
+- 估计总时长
+- 视频类型（广告/短剧/纪录片等）
+- 主题/品牌/产品
+- 整体基调
+
+## 2. 时间戳分镜逐帧解析
+为每个镜头提供（要穷尽所有镜头）：
+- 时间戳（开始-结束，精确到秒）
+- 镜头编号
+- 景别（特写/近景/中景/全景/大全景）
+- 机位角度（正面/侧面/俯拍/仰拍/主观视角等）
+- 摄像机运动（静止/推/拉/摇/移/跟/升降/手持）
+- 画面主体内容（人物/场景/产品/动作，极其详细）
+- 台词/字幕/旁白（精确转录，如有请逐字写出）
+- 情绪/节奏感
+- 特效/转场方式
+
+## 3. 主角与人物分析
+- 主要角色外貌特征（性别、年龄、肤色、发型、面部特征）
+- 服装描述（颜色、款式、配饰）
+- 情绪状态变化
+- 动作特征
+
+## 4. 画面风格与视觉语言
+- 整体色调/调色风格（色温、饱和度、对比度）
+- 灯光方式（自然光/人工光/混合，光位方向）
+- 构图方式（三分法/中心构图/引导线等）
+- 景深处理（浅景深/大景深）
+- 画面质感（电影感/广告感/真实纪录感）
+
+## 5. 场景环境
+- 主要拍摄地点（室内/室外）
+- 环境氛围（时间、天气、空间感）
+- 背景元素（道具、装饰）
+
+## 6. 音频分析
+- 背景音乐风格描述
+- 旁白内容（完整精确转录，逐字）
+- 字幕文字（完整转录）
+- 音效元素
+
+## 9. 台词与字幕精确提取（必填）
+
+**提取优先级：**
+1. **优先**：如果画面中有烧录/叠加的字幕文字，直接读取字幕内容——画面字幕时间戳最准确
+2. **Fallback**：如果没有可见字幕，根据音轨中的人声转录台词和旁白
+
+**必须以如下 JSON 格式输出这一段（即使没有台词也要输出空数组）：**
+
+```json
+"captions": [
+  {"start": 1.2, "end": 3.8, "text": "这款精华液真的太好用了"},
+  {"start": 4.0, "end": 6.2, "text": "用了一周皮肤就亮了很多"}
+]
+```
+
+规则：
+- `start` / `end` 单位为秒（浮点数）
+- `text` 是原文逐字转录，不要意译或缩写
+- 如果同一时间段同时有画面字幕和旁白，以画面字幕文字为准
+- 没有任何台词时输出 `"captions": []`，不要省略这个字段
+
+⚠️ **强制输出规则**：
+在你的回复**末尾**，必须单独输出以下格式的完整 captions JSON block，不得遗漏，不得嵌套在其他文字中：
+
+```
+CAPTIONS_JSON_START
+{"captions": [...]}
+CAPTIONS_JSON_END
+```
+
+这是机器解析标记，必须严格遵守：`CAPTIONS_JSON_START` 和 `CAPTIONS_JSON_END` 各占独立一行，中间只有一行 JSON。
+
+## 7. 叙事结构
+- 开篇hook方式（前3秒如何吸引注意）
+- 中段情绪发展节奏
+- 结尾收束/CTA内容
+
+## 8. 信息流广告特征
+- 目标受众画像
+- 核心产品/服务卖点（列举所有）
+- 情绪触点
+- 营销策略与转化路径
+
+请尽可能精确和详细，这份分析将用于视频内容的专业复刻制作。
+```

+# Seedance Chunk Prompt Template
+
+Use this template for each video chunk in Step 4. Seedance max is 15s per chunk.
+
+## Chunking Strategy
+
+| Video Duration | Chunks | Each Chunk |
+|---|---|---|
+| ≤ 15s | 1 chunk | Full video |
+| 16-30s | 2 chunks | ~half each |
+| 31-45s | 3 chunks | ~third each |
+
+Name chunks sequentially: Chunk A, Chunk B, Chunk C...
+Run all chunks in parallel via separate `sessions_spawn` subagents.
+
+---
+
+## Chunk Prompt Template (Chinese — Seedance performs better with Chinese prompts)
+
+```
+参考`图片1`中的分镜[前N格/后N格/第X-Y格]构图，生成竖版信息流[品类]广告的[前/后/第X]半段视频（约[N]秒）。
+
+整体风格：[从Gemini分析§4提取：色调、质感、风格描述]，竖屏9:16构图。
+
+画面按以下顺序呈现：
+
+【段落1 [时间范围] [场景名称]】
+[人物描述：年龄、肤色、发型、服装、配饰]，[动作描述]，[背景/场景描述]。
+[运镜：手持微晃/静止/跟拍]，[情绪描述]。
+
+【段落2 [时间范围] [场景名称]】
+[场景切换说明]。[画面主体描述]。[摄像机运动]，[情绪描述]。
+
+【段落3 [时间范围] [场景名称]】
+[场景描述]，[动作描述]，[情绪描述]。
+
+运镜：[汇总各段运镜方式]。整体节奏明快，每段[X-Y]秒快切。
+```
+
+---
+
+## Key Rules
+
+1. **Reference the storyboard panels**: Always start with `参考\`图片1\`中的分镜[...]`
+2. **Describe the same character consistently** across all chunks (copy exact appearance description)
+3. **Scene transitions**: Use "切回/切到" to indicate scene switches
+4. **Camera movement**: Specify per scene — `手持微晃` (vlog handheld), `镜头静止` (studio static), `俯拍` (overhead)
+5. **No scripted dialogue**: Seedance infers VO from visual/text context; do not expect exact lines
+6. **Emotion labels**: Include explicit emotion per scene segment (`情绪：甜蜜、兴奋` etc.)
+
+---
+
+## Example: 9-second Chunk A (Hook → Product Reveal → Unboxing)
+
+```
+参考`图片1`中的分镜前三格构图，生成竖版信息流美妆广告的前半段视频（约9秒）。
+
+整体风格：温暖生活感Vlog质感与奢华美妆广告精准感融合，真实摄影感，商业广告级调色，竖屏9:16构图。
+
+画面按以下顺序呈现：
+
+【段落1 前3秒 Hook开场】
+一位30岁左右的中国女性，小麦肤色，黑色微卷长发自然披散，双臂有纹身，穿米白色亚麻马甲，
+站在布满复古水晶玻璃器皿的深色木质餐边柜旁，直面镜头用自然聊天语气说话，神情俏皮自然。
+画面偏暖琥珀调，手持摄影微晃，人物在画面右三分之一，左侧展示复古柜台背景。浅景深。
+
+【段落2 3-6秒 产品首秀】
+画面切到暖黄色纯净背景（棚拍风格）。一只精致的手提着印有品牌字样的米色奢华购物袋缓缓进入
+画面，袋中可见带有心形镂空设计的限定礼盒包装。画面干净明亮，产品质感高级，光泽感强。
+镜头静止，产品居中。
+
+【段落3 6-9秒 拆箱互动】
+切回复古木屋暖调场景。同一位女性打开礼盒纸箱，取出礼盒，转头对着镜头露出惊喜且满意的笑容，
+随后从盒中拿出产品瓶身展示给镜头。手持跟拍，情绪甜蜜、兴奋。
+
+运镜：Vlog段手持微晃，产品段静止。整体节奏明快，每段2-3秒快切。
+```
